data.body: EPIC gnu-whale-ichor CLOSED + SIGNED (plan-review + completion-verifier attestations; all 10 ACs validated, all children closed). AC7 completion-verifier initially FAILED (verify-identity not in cli-reference — implementer had hidden it from the drift regex via in-membership); FIXED: split intercept into == arms + added verify-identity + verify-authorship to INTERCEPT_COMMANDS + regenerated cli-reference.md, folded into 580(v2). Re-closed AC7 PASS. Stack rebased onto current origin/main 24e9c863c (FFO contention — other session landed auto-lander S2c-S6; clean rebase, no conflict). LANDING NOW: re-push (all 8 re-CI on new base + cli-ref fix), wait green, submit top (581).
